'''Yugi''' was a [[Flakax]] [[Joiner]], sent along with [[Tito]], assigned to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] by the [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] known as the ''[[Directors]]''. He failed in his mission and was sliced in two by Leia's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
